_about: R14-seed base — multi-process YAAH deployment over a local NATS server. Workers serve subsets of roles, the orchestrator runs in a separate process. Durable state via file store so a worker restart resumes correctly. Pair with `_extends: 'path/to/nats.base.json'`, then add `providers`, `default_provider`, `pipeline`, `serve` (which roles this host runs), and `input`. Pick this base for: local-over-NATS dev (one box, many workers), multi-tenant smoke, anything that wants resume-after-crash.
